title: dasypyrum hordeaceum var. velutinum
intro: Dasypyrum hordeaceum var. velutinum, also known as soft brome or soft cheat, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the wheat family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dasypyrum hordeaceum var. velutinum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Soft brome can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can be dried and used in various herbal preparations, such as tinctures and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
